changelog:
THE RELAY PROTOCOL (v7.3):
- [SOCIAL] The Relay Protocol: Introduced the '[ 🔁 RELAY ]' button allowing commanders to seamlessly re-broadcast and curate transmissions across the Constellation.
- [SECURITY] The Anti-Loop Shield: Implemented strict 'origin_id' DNA tracking to instantly detect and eliminate signal reverberations (Echo Chambers) and network loops.
- [SYSTEM] Cascading Chain-Purge: Upgraded the Scorched Earth and Global Purge protocols to dynamically cascade through relayed nodes, automatically destroying mirrored data across the entire Trust Chain.
